summary: Remove the @deprecated analyzerService constructor parameter and private field from IndexingOrchestrator. Update the single CLI caller and the single test fixture that still pass the now-unused argument. Two atomic commits (production then test) gated by tsc + vitest.

phases.label: Production cleanup

tasks.subject: Remove analyzerService field + ctor param from IndexingOrchestrator
operations: Delete `import type { AnalyzerService } from '../../analyzer/analyzer-service.js';` at L14
Delete `private analyzerService: AnalyzerService;` at L360
Delete `analyzerService: AnalyzerService,` ctor parameter at L366
Delete `this.analyzerService = analyzerService;` ctor body at L371
Update class JSDoc header at L356-358 to reflect simpler dependency surface (no longer mentions AnalyzerService as a dependency)

tasks.subject: Remove AnalyzerService construction + argument from CLI caller
operations: Delete `import { AnalyzerService } from '../analyzer/analyzer-service.js';` at L14
Delete `const analyzerService = new AnalyzerService(args.projectDir);` at L437
Delete `analyzerService,` argument from `new IndexingOrchestrator(...)` call at L441 (so the call becomes `new IndexingOrchestrator(llmProvider, vectorStore, args.projectDir)`)

tasks.subject: tsc + vitest gate (production layer)
operations: Run `tsc --noEmit` against tsconfig.json — must be clean
Run `tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.cli.json` — must be clean
If either fails, HALT — investigate missed callsite and surface to ORCHESTRATOR before C2

phases.phase_gate: Phase 1 commit landed AND tsc clean both configs. If gate fails, HALT and report to ORCHESTRATOR.

Delete `mockAnalyzerService,` argument from `new IndexingOrchestrator(...)` call at L152

Delete or condense the L140-146 commentary block — the 'regression sentinel' it describes refers to an assertion that does not exist in source. If keeping any text, condense to a single line noting that IndexingOrchestrator no longer takes an analyzer dependency post-WO-RAG-INDEX-SINGLE-ANALYZER-SLICE-001
Audit any other test in src/integration/rag/__tests__/ that constructs IndexingOrchestrator with analyzerService — same edit treatment if found

Run dual-AC fixture from commit affff3a — AC-05a 2415===2415 + AC-05b 263===263 both PASS
Run graph-ground-truth.test.ts — 6/6 PASS

Hand off to ORCHESTRATOR for cross-project /close-workorder dispatch (mirrors the WO-RAG-INDEX-SINGLE-ANALYZER-SLICE-001 pattern: CORE completes, SKILLS closes via dispatch)

phases.phase_gate: Communication.json closeout-ready. ORCHESTRATOR dispatches SKILLS for cross-project /close-workorder.

src/cli/rag-index.ts no longer constructs AnalyzerService or passes it to IndexingOrchestrator
All existing tests in src/integration/rag/__tests__/ + __tests__/pipeline/ continue to PASS
acceptance_criteria.verification: vitest run shows green for all relevant suites

acceptance_criteria.statement: AC-05a + AC-05b dual-AC identity tests (commit affff3a fixture) remain PASS — substrate identity preserved
Net negative LOC in src/integration/rag/* + src/cli/rag-index.ts (real cleanup, not zero-sum)
acceptance_criteria.verification: git diff --stat over the 2-commit range shows deletions exceed insertions; target ~-15 net LOC

acceptance_criteria.statement: AnalyzerService source code (src/analyzer/analyzer-service.ts) untouched (still used by populate-coderef CLI)
acceptance_criteria.verification: git diff over range shows zero changes to that file

acceptance_criteria.statement: No predecessor archive disturbed (path-normalization-fix, rag-index-single-analyzer-slice, pipeline-indexing-rag)
acceptance_criteria.verification: git diff over range shows zero changes under coderef/archived/

acceptance_criteria.statement: Cultural validator scope-mode 11/11 PASS + tracking validator scope-mode 15/15 PASS
acceptance_criteria.verification: Both validators pass at close time

acceptance_criteria.statement: /close-workorder produces ARCHIVED.md + tracking ledger updates + workorder_completed/closed events

decisions_record.decision: Two atomic commits rather than one — separate production cleanup from test cleanup
decisions_record.rationale: Keeps tsc gate clean between phases. If C1 fails the tsc check, the test file is untouched and the failure is isolated. Easier to bisect later.

decisions_record.decision: Delete the regression-sentinel commentary at indexing-pipeline.test.ts L140-146 rather than activating it
decisions_record.rationale: The comment claims an assertion (`expect(analyzerService.analyze).not.toHaveBeenCalled()`) exists; grep confirms it does not. The mock is genuinely dead weight. Activating the assertion would require the field to stay (defeats this WO's purpose) or asserting on a removed field (impossible). Deleting the misleading commentary is the honest move.

decisions_record.decision: Do NOT touch AnalyzerService source code (src/analyzer/analyzer-service.ts)
decisions_record.rationale: AnalyzerService is still used by populate-coderef CLI and by BreakingChangeDetector. Only the IndexingOrchestrator dependency on it goes away. Touching the analyzer source would expand blast radius unnecessarily.
Predecessor WO ARCHIVED.md exhaustively documented the dependency surface. Three callsites known at scoping time. Adding an investigation phase would be ceremony without information yield.

estimated_loc_delta: -15 net (target: production -8 to -10, test -5 to -8, JSDoc -1 to -2)
